understanding.goal_understanding: Place all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time; a level only reports WIN when every goal tile is occupied by a selectable piece simultaneously, and completing all levels wins the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions were issued by CLICKing a target coordinate. A CLICK either selected a piece (when clicking on/near a selectable piece) or attempted to move the currently selected piece toward the clicked location according to the level’s movement rules. Movement could be blocked by walls/obstacles, other pieces, or invalid paths, in which case the piece stayed in place and a step was still consumed. When movement was possible, the selected piece shifted to the resulting valid position. Each action spent one step from a finite per-level budget; running out of steps ended the attempt.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 1/2 failed after 64 turns. Restarting the same level.
Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
